message:
feat(fsqlite-harness): add fault VFS, fslab allocator, and expanded test suite

Expand the test harness crate with fault injection and new test coverage:

- fault_vfs.rs (new): deterministic fault-injection VFS that can
  simulate I/O errors at configurable points for crash-recovery testing
- fslab.rs (new): slab allocator for test page buffers to reduce
  allocation noise in benchmarks and stress tests
- raptorq_permeation_audit.rs: update permeation audit test to reflect
  new crate structure
- commit_repair_async.rs (new): async commit + repair test exercising
  crash-during-commit scenarios
- cx_sealed_enforcement.rs (new): compile-time sealed-trait enforcement
  tests ensuring internal traits can't be implemented externally
- shm_interop.rs (new): shared-memory interop tests for multi-process
  WAL coordination
- tests/ui/ (new): trybuild UI tests for compile-error quality on
  sealed trait violations (pass and fail cases with expected stderr)
- Cargo.toml: add trybuild and async runtime test dependencies

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@ +error[E0277]: the trait bound `ExternalCursor: traits::sealed::Sealed` is not satisfied + --> tests/ui/sealed_btree_cursor_impl_fail.rs:7:25 + | +7 | impl BtreeCursorOps for ExternalCursor { + | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ unsatisfied trait bound + | +help: the trait `traits::sealed::Sealed` is not implemented for `ExternalCursor` + --> tests/ui/sealed_btree_cursor_impl_fail.rs:5:1 + | +5 | struct ExternalCursor; + | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ +help: the following other types implement trait `traits::sealed::Sealed` + --> $WORKSPACE/crates/fsqlite-btree/src/traits.rs + | + | impl sealed::Sealed for MockBtreeCursor {} + | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ `MockBtreeCursor` + | + ::: $WORKSPACE/crates/fsqlite-btree/src/cursor.rs + | + | impl sealed::Sealed for BtCursor

{} + | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ `BtCursor

` +note: required by a bound in `BtreeCursorOps` + --> $WORKSPACE/crates/fsqlite-btree/src/traits.rs + | + | pub trait BtreeCursorOps: sealed::Sealed { + | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ required by this bound in `BtreeCursorOps` + = note: `BtreeCursorOps` is a "sealed trait", because to implement it you also need to implement `fsqlite_btree::traits::sealed::Sealed`, which is not accessible; this is usually done to force you to use one of the provided types that already implement it + = help: the following types implement the trait: + fsqlite_btree::cursor::BtCursor

+ fsqlite_btree::MockBtreeCursor

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+error[E0277]: the trait bound `ExternalCheckpointWriter: traits::sealed::Sealed` is not satisfied
+ --> tests/ui/sealed_checkpoint_writer_impl_fail.rs:8:31
+  |
+8 | impl CheckpointPageWriter for ExternalCheckpointWriter {
+  |                               ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ unsatisfied trait bound
+  |
+help: the trait `traits::sealed::Sealed` is not implemented for `ExternalCheckpointWriter`
+ --> tests/ui/sealed_checkpoint_writer_impl_fail.rs:6:1
+  |
+6 | struct ExternalCheckpointWriter;
+  | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
+help: the following other types implement trait `traits::sealed::Sealed`
+ --> $WORKSPACE/crates/fsqlite-pager/src/traits.rs
+  |
+  | impl sealed::Sealed for MockMvccPager {}
+  | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ `MockMvccPager`
+...
+  | impl sealed::Sealed for MockTransaction {}
+  | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ `MockTransaction`
+...
+  | impl sealed::Sealed for MockCheckpointPageWriter {}
+  | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ `MockCheckpointPageWriter`
+note: required by a bound in `CheckpointPageWriter`
+ --> $WORKSPACE/crates/fsqlite-pager/src/traits.rs
+  |
+  | pub trait CheckpointPageWriter: sealed::Sealed + Send {
+  |                                 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ required by this bound in `CheckpointPageWriter`
+  = note: `CheckpointPageWriter` is a "sealed trait", because to implement it you also need to implement `fsqlite_pager::traits::sealed::Sealed`, which is not accessible; this is usually done to force you to use one of the provided types that already implement it
+  = help: the following types implement the trait:
+            fsqlite_pager::MockMvccPager
+            fsqlite_pager::MockTransaction
+            fsqlite_pager::MockCheckpointPageWriter
